rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP. RE 1436 PALOU AVE.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing; Joint Claim For Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2017 line 1. CLAIMANTs QUENTIN GREENE and DONALD GREENE's Joint Claim For Surplus Funds GRANTED. Having complied with Probate Code section 13101, each shall take 1/3 of the surplus funds deposited with the clerk of the court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAO ZHEN WU VS. KEITH HENRY ARMSTRONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Defendants' Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs KEITH ARMSTRONG and SUMMER SIMPSON's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Defendants' Motion For Attorneys Fees DENIED.
